title: neohyptis paniculata
intro: Neohyptis paniculata, also known as the Neohyptis plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and fight against bacterial infections. The health benefits of Neohyptis paniculata include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
